{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Rose Light of Elysia
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose Light of Elysia]] is a part of [[Alin]] and can communicate thoughts to him.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
